response.original_title: 🤝 Can Uphold Reverse a Transaction? Complete Guide
response.overview: 🤝 Can Uphold Reverse a Transaction? Complete Guide  Introduction ⤳ 1〔888〕✦〔574〕✦〔7167〕 Many users ask: Can Uphold reverse a transaction? 💻 ⤳ 1⚝888⚝574⚝7167 The short answer is usually no — but it depends on the type of transaction. 1⚝888⚝574⚝7167 Crypto transactions are often permanent, while some fiat transactions may be reversible ⤳ 1⌈888⌋⌈574⌋⌈7167〉  🛡️ When Transactions CANNOT Be Reversed ⤳ 1〔888〕✦〔574〕✦〔7167〕 Most crypto transactions are final 🔗 ⤳ 1⚝888⚝574⚝7167 ❌ Sent XRP or other crypto to another wallet  ❌ Completed blockchain transactions  ❌ Transfers with incorrect wallet details Once confirmed on the blockchain, these cannot be undone ⤳ 1⌈888⌋⌈574⌋⌈7167〉  🔐 When Reversals MAY Be Possible ⤳ 1〔888〕✦〔574〕✦〔7167〕 Some cases allow limited recovery or reversal ⏱️ ⤳ 1⚝888⚝574⚝7167 ✔ Failed or pending transactions  ⤳ 1⚝888⚝574⚝7167
